title: Here’s How Iran Could Respond to Renewed U.S.-Israeli Strikes
summary_full: In any new round of fighting, Iranian officials could adopt new tactics, including intensified strikes on neighbors and trying to close off a second strait.
summary_public: In any new round of fighting, Iranian officials could adopt new tactics, including intensified strikes on neighbors and trying to close off a second strait.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: intensified strikes on neighbors and trying to close off a second strait.
